nodes.label: Multi-stage Container Image
nodes.rationale: Multi-stage build from uv.lock for reproducibility, non-root user, uvicorn with --proxy-headers so the real client IP reaches the per-IP rate limiter.

nodes.label: Reverse Proxy / TLS Termination
nodes.rationale: TLS terminates at a reverse proxy/ingress; the app is documented to expect sitting behind one rather than handling TLS itself.

nodes.label: Shared Redis Store for Multi-process
nodes.rationale: Rate-limit state is in-memory per process; with multiple workers limits become per-worker unless backed by a shared store (Redis).
